title: Multi-Entity Chart of Accounts Mapping Template
shortDescription: Map local accounts to a common reporting structure, assign owners, flag unmapped balances, and summarize close exceptions.
about:
Designed for controllers and accounting teams standardizing reporting across multiple entities. Record each entity's local account, canonical destination, reporting category, balance, and accountable owner. Formula-driven mapping status flags gaps before they enter a consolidation.

The workbook includes sample data, visible controls, and a printable Summary. It does not replace accounting-policy judgment; document allocation rules, mapping changes, and material reclassifications outside the template.
excerpt: Free multi-entity chart of accounts mapping template with account owners, mapping-status controls, balances, sample data, and a printable summary.
imageAlt: Multi-entity chart of accounts mapping summary
